anomalies.title: Critical duplicate intel rate detected
anomalies.description: Duplicate rate is 64.4%, exceeding critical threshold of 40%. Dedup engine may be bypassed or fingerprint logic is broken.
anomalies.recommendation: Audit dedup_state.py fingerprint logic. Re-run enforce_feed_uniqueness on manifest.

anomalies.title: Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed
anomalies.description: 10 items carry masked actor_fingerprint patterns (e.g. 'CDB-CVE-****'). APEX AI actor resolution is not applying P0 fix.
anomalies.recommendation: Re-run master_p0_fix.py. Verify _resolve_actor_fingerprint() returns UNATTRIBUTED for generic tags.

anomalies.title: API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old)
anomalies.description: File is 74.1h old, exceeding 6h critical threshold. Scheduled pipeline may not be running.
anomalies.recommendation: Check GitHub Actions cron schedule. Verify sentinel-blogger.yml workflow.

anomalies.title: Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items
anomalies.description: 94/177 feed items are missing 'risk_score'. Ingestion or enrichment stage may be stripping this field.
anomalies.recommendation: Audit enrichment pipeline for 'risk_score' propagation. Check paywall_filter.py field stripping.

all.title: Validate + clean dedup state
all.description: Run dedup_state.py validation against current manifest to purge stale fingerprints.
all.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
all.rollback: data/processed_intel.json is backed up as .tmp before any write.

all.title: Seed dedup state from manifest
all.description: Bootstrap dedup state from all existing manifest items to prevent future duplicates.
all.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)

all.title: Rebuild feed manifest
all.description: Re-run manifest builder to consolidate all intel sources into feed_manifest.json.
all.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
all.rollback: Previous manifest backed up to data/.manifest_backups/ automatically.

all.title: Tighten title similarity dedup threshold
all.description: Lower Jaccard similarity threshold in enforce_feed_uniqueness() to catch more near-dupes.
all.rationale: [CRITICAL] Critical duplicate intel rate detected — dedup_skip_rate_approx=0.6439 (threshold: 0.4)
all.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/dedup_state.py — adjust similarity_threshold parameter.
all.rollback: git revert last commit to dedup_state.py
all.approval_reason: Changing dedup sensitivity may over-filter legitimate intel variants.

all.title: Force APEX AI rebuild on all items
all.description: Run master_p0_fix.py to unconditionally rebuild apex_ai block on every intel item.
all.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)

all.title: Refresh API feed files
all.description: Regenerate api/feed.json and api/latest.json from current manifest.
all.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)
all.rollback: Restore api/feed.json from git: git checkout HEAD -- api/feed.json

all.title: Run full regression test suite
all.description: Execute regression_tests.py to verify system integrity before/after changes.
all.rationale: [HIGH] API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old) — api_latest_age_hours=74.12 (threshold: 6)
all.estimated_impact: MEDIUM: Restores dashboard data freshness. Improves user experience.

all.title: Recalibrate APEX AI risk scoring thresholds
all.description: Adjust P1/P2/P3/P4 risk_score thresholds in build_apex_ai() to improve accuracy.
all.rationale: [HIGH] Masked actor fingerprints detected in live feed — masked_actor_count=10 (threshold: 0)
all.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/master_p0_fix.py — modify risk threshold constants.
all.rollback: git revert last commit to master_p0_fix.py
all.approval_reason: Modifies core APEX AI scoring logic. Requires SOC validation before deployment.

all.title: Configure external alerting for health anomalies
all.description: Integrate Telegram/email alerts when system_health score drops below threshold.
all.rationale: [HIGH] API api/latest.json critically stale (74.1h old) — api_latest_age_hours=74.12 (threshold: 6)
all.command: MANUAL: Configure scripts/pipeline_alert.py with webhook endpoints.
all.rollback: Disable alert config. No platform changes.
all.approval_reason: Requires external service credentials and outbound network configuration.
all.estimated_impact: MEDIUM: Restores dashboard data freshness. Improves user experience.

all.title: Validate intel schema integrity
all.description: Run validate_intel_schema.py to detect missing required fields and malformed items.
all.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)

all.title: Clear data cache
all.description: Remove stale cached data files to force fresh ingestion on next run.
all.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)
all.rollback: Cache rebuilt automatically on next pipeline run. No data loss.

all.title: Add new intel feed sources
all.description: Integrate additional threat intel sources (OTX, CISA, MISP) to diversify coverage.
all.rationale: [MEDIUM] Required field 'risk_score' missing in 53% of feed items — missing_risk_score_rate=0.5311 (threshold: 0.05)
all.command: MANUAL: Edit scripts/run_pipeline.py — add new source URLs to FEED_SOURCES list.
all.rollback: Remove added source URLs from FEED_SOURCES. Rerun pipeline.
all.approval_reason: Adding new sources changes ingestion flow and may introduce unvalidated data.

suggestions: Stage 'monitor' consumed 81% of total cycle time (0.1s). Consider async execution or caching.
